DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $501.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. (610/BCHAN)
